title: Internet and Wi-Fi Issues
drDigitalIntro: No internet: check if you're connected to Wi-Fi (look at Wi-Fi icon), restart your router (unplug it, wait 30 seconds, plug it back in), forget the network and reconnect. Sites won't load: try a different site first (might be the website, not your Mac), restart your router, clear browser cache. Video streaming is slow: might mean your internet is slow (test with speedtest.com), or the video quality is set too high.
drDigitalSuccess: You can fix internet connection problems!
drDigitalHint: Restarting your router fixes most internet issues.
